mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in retail sales signals stronger household demand and near-term revenue momentum; higher RSAFS growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce positive 20-day return spread versus lower growth states in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 for two consecutive years.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is above 4.5% and rising over 3 months, restrictive policy raises discount rates and financing costs, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.5% and is higher than 3 months earlier
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS snapshot value 5.26 indicates a high policy-rate environment
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if their mean forward return is not below unconditional mean return.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion combined with a falling unemployment rate confirms broad labor-income growth; rising PAYEMS and declining UNRATE jointly predict positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE falls by at least 0.2pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE snapshot value 4.6 indicates tight labor conditions
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down state fails to outperform other labor states over 60 trading days, or if the interaction coefficient is not positive in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in industrial production signals weakening output and margin pressure; falling INDPRO over two consecutive months predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls for 2 consecutive monthly observations
failure_condition: Reject if two-month INDPRO declines are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if conditional returns are not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts are an early-cycle demand indicator; when HOUST falls sharply from its 12-month average, weaker construction activity predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average by more than 10%
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside breaks do not lead lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered periods, or if the return spread is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation acceleration during a high-rate regime tightens real financial conditions; rising CPIAUCSL combined with FEDFUNDS above 4% predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth rises and FEDFUNDS is above 4%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL snapshot value 208.028 and FEDFUNDS snapshot value 5.26 define a high-rate inflation-monitoring regime
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with inflation pressure
failure_condition: Reject if the CPI acceleration and high-FEDFUNDS interaction has nonnegative average 5-day forward returns or if the interaction term is not negative in rolling predictive regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate signals deterioration in expected earnings and risk appetite; an increase in UNRATE of at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if conditional returns are not below unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP deceleration combined with weak retail sales identifies a broad demand slowdown; falling GDPC1 growth and negative RSAFS momentum jointly predict negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth slows and RSAFS 3-month growth is negative
failure_condition: Reject if the joint GDPC1 slowdown and negative RSAFS momentum state does not underperform other demand states over 60 trading days, or if its walk-forward hit rate for negative returns is below 55%.
